entry.title: Re: Modifying the default texts of mail in SEN
entry.content:
Hi Mani,

It is possible to modify some of the standard email messages that are sent by Manager but I don't think that it can be done for that specific message.  To modify the email message templates in the Cloud version:

1. Open Manager
2. Navigate to the System Workarea
3. Start editing the Resources > Adaptable Resources > Mail object
4. Click on the Assets tab and then click the Show Streams button.  You should see this:

 5. Click on the hyperlink (the name) beside one of the messages and you will see the structure of the template used for the corresponding message
6. If you right click that structure and choose View Source, you will see the HTML that makes up that template
7. If you modify that template text and reload it using the Replace File link, you can change the corresponding message.  You can use HTML to format the text in the modified template
8. After reloading a template, finish editing and publish the Mail object

I tested all the templates and none appear to be the one used for the new user message.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Can we apply heading style and body text in SAP Enabl...
entry.content:
Hi there,

Every Simulation bubble is based on a bubble style.  There are two parts to each bubble style so you must have editing control of both to make the changes.  To change the formatting of the text that appears in Simulation bubbles you will need to:

1. Open Producer
2. Navigate to the Resources > Adaptable Resources section and start editing the bubble style object that you want to modify, e.g. Big Title Bar Blue

3. Navigate to the Resources > Bubble Styles area and start modifying the corresponding version of the same bubble style object
4. After you have editing control of both objects, double click one to open it
5. Open the Title Text area of settings
6. Apply your styling details
7. Open the Content Text area of settings
8. Apply your styling details
9. Save the change and close the Style Editor window
10. Finish editing and publish both bubble style objects

Regards
Shane

entry.title: How to incorporate Hourly employees into Compensation Module?
entry.content:
We would like to have the Hourly employees in the United States incorporated into compensation module so that their bonus and salary increase process can be handled through the system. Additionally, we would like to automatically generate documents related to the module.

We are currently exploring the features and opportunities offered by the compensation templates.

How can we achieve this?

entry.title: CONTACT BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE FOR BITCOIN AND ETHEREUM RECOVERY
entry.content:
I am compelled to share my remarkable experience with BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE, a team of exceptional bitcoin recovery experts who have been a beacon of hope in the darkest of times. As an avid investor in the cryptocurrency market, I had the misfortune of falling prey to a sophisticated phishing scam that left me with a depleted wallet and a shattered sense of security.

The incident occurred when I received an email that appeared to be from a reputable cryptocurrency exchange, requesting me to update my account information. Unbeknownst to me, the email was a cleverly crafted trap designed to steal my sensitive information. Before I knew it, my bitcoin wallet had been drained of its entire contents.

Devastated and feeling utterly helpless, I began to search for a solution online. That's when I stumbled upon BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE, a company that claimed to specialize in bitcoin recovery services. I was skeptical at first, but after reading numerous positive reviews and testimonials from satisfied clients, I decided to take a chance.

From the moment I contacted BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE, I was treated with professionalism and empathy. Their team of experts, led by a brilliant and seasoned cryptocurrency forensic analyst, listened attentively to my situation and assured me that they would do everything in their power to recover my stolen bitcoins.

The recovery process was a complex and intricate one, involving a thorough analysis of the phishing scam's digital footprint and a series of sophisticated cryptographic techniques. Throughout the process, the BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE team kept me informed of their progress, providing regular updates and insights into their methodology.

To my absolute delight, BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE was able to successfully recover 95% of my stolen bitcoins, a feat that I thought was impossible. The relief and joy I felt upon receiving the news was indescribable.

I am deeply grateful to BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE for their incredible expertise, dedication, and commitment to justice. Their unwavering determination to combat cryptocurrency fraud and protect innocent victims like myself is truly admirable. I highly recommend their services to anyone who has fallen victim to bitcoin theft or fraud.

In conclusion, BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE is more than just a bitcoin recovery service – they are a symbol of hope and a beacon of light in the dark world of cryptocurrency fraud. Their exceptional expertise, professionalism, and unwavering commitment to their clients make them the go-to solution for anyone seeking to recover their stolen bitcoins.

If you or someone you know has been a victim of bitcoin theft or fraud, do not hesitate to contact BLOCKCHAIN CYBER RETRIEVE. They will work tirelessly to recover your stolen assets and bring the perpetrators to justice.

Contact Information:
Email: blockchaincyberretrieve001@zohomail.com
Whatsapp:+15205648300
Website: https://blockchaincyberretrieve.com

entry.title: SAP GUI 8.0 PATCH 9 HOTFIX 1
entry.content:
Dear all

I would like to download last patch form SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.0 , PATCH 9, HOTFIX 1, but just the patch, to update our server and update all Clients customers.

Can you help me to find this update? Not all SAP GUI packet

 

thanks in advance


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP GUI 8.0 PATCH 9 HOTFIX 1
entry.content:
Hello customer,

Thank you for reaching out to SAP.

The step-by-step to find the latest patch level available for SAP GUI for Windows can be found in the  KBA 2283851  - Tutorial "Where can I get a SAP Frontend patches?" 

The latest SAP GUI version and patch can be downloaded from the SAP Support Portal:

Software Center - SAP for Me

# "Installations & Upgrades"

 # "By Category"

  # "SAP Frontend Components"

   # "SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS"

    # "SAP GUI FOR WINDOWS 8.00 CORE "

     # "Support Packages and Patches"

        # SAP GUI for Windows 8.00 PL09 (Note 1053737) --> Select either 32 bit or 64 bit recommendation. To know more about functional differences between 32 and 64 bit version, check SAP Note 3218166.

 

Best regards,

SAP Technical Support

entry.title: MOG
entry.content:
Hi all,

Does anyone have idea on the SAP journals after a MOG?

Do we move assets and liabilities, expenses and income and adjust through equity.

Please assist.

Thank you.

entry.title: Issue with sap.ui.core.Component.create and sap.ui.fl.flexState
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

After updating SAP UI5 to version 1.120.21 ( error also occurs on version 1.120.0 & 1.120.18 ) on our S/4HANA 2023 on-premise system (SAP_BASIS 758, SAP_UI 758), I’ve encountered a random error while resolving the promise of sap.ui.core.Component.create.

Upon deeper investigation, the error seems to originate from sap/ui/fl/apply/_internal/flexState/FlexState.js, specifically in the executeFunction of DataSelector. It appears that one of my components is occasionally missing the runtimePersistence object, which results in the error. This issue occurs inconsistently across multiple components.

I’ve reviewed the version change logs but couldn’t find anything that addresses this specific issue. One of the closest note I could find was : https://me.sap.com/notes/3506053/E (I suspected it was an ui5 version issue and updated my version to 1.120.21 but the error still occurs ). Has anyone else faced a similar problem after the update or found a solution?

Any guidance or suggestions would be highly appreciated.

Thank you!

entry.title: How to display keys in dropdown list in Fiori
entry.content:
Users are using FB70 in Fiori, in SAPGUI for Windows, the key is displayed in dropdown list but it is missing in Fiori

Please share the setting where to show keys in Fiori


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: How to display keys in dropdown list in Fiori
entry.content: Please refer to KBA ##2723816 - WEBGUI: How to show keys in dropdown/combobox elements

entry.title: UIGEF001 maps in S4HANA 2023
entry.content:

We are upgrading from S4HANA 1909 to 2023. Currently using UIGEF001 maps but the GEF components are not loading in gef_map_uiv2 app. We learnt that we need to use UIS4HOP1 maps from 2021. But since we have extended the UIGEF001 maps, is there any way to make UIGEF001 maps(UI5 app gef_map_uiv2 app) work in S4HANA 2023.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: mass deletion of customers
entry.content:
Hello 

You can go with t code XD99 - 
IF you want mark customer for deletion at Central level  you can use 


But if You need to mark customer deletion flag at particular sales org level then use xd99-knvv table -

I hope these details are informative.

Thank You

entry.title: SAP Signavio Process Manager - Attribute Visualization for attributes in dictionary entries
entry.content:
Hello!

For each process in the process architecture, I have created an entry in the dictionary within the Process category. I associated attributes such as country, business, criticality, etc. to this entry.

In the Value Chain diagram, I have created a collapsed process object for each of the processes at the respective level of the hierarchy. When I consult the list of properties of these objects, I can see the attributes I created in the dictionary with their respective values.

However, these attributes do not appear as available in the visualization layers configuration, only the attributes linked directly to the diagram object. How can I create visualization rules for these attributes linked to dictionary entries?

Thanks in advance

entry.title: Mass Maintenance Order Printing Issue
entry.content:
Hello experts, in SAP Hana, can we do bulk print for PM order through IW38 ?
since I was run the tcode and got the error as follows after clicking the Print Preview button :

Print view from list not allowed. Papers will be created

Message no. IW257

Diagnosis

You requested the print view.

This view is not available from the list editing function.

System Response

The system cannot perform the function.

Procedure

You can only call up the print view from the individual processing function.

 

Regards,

Subagyo

entry.title: Hello World

This experience honed my expertise in external audit, compilation engagements, agreed-upon procedures, and financial reporting. My unwavering work ethic, impeccable organization, and punctuality guarantee deadline-busting performance. In addition to above I am pursuing Chartered Accountancy (CA) from The Institute of Chartered Accountants of Pakistan. 

I am super excited to part of this SAP Community

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano 

I am a SAP FI Consultant from Vietnam. I've been working in SAP FI  for almost a year. I identified as a person for this certification because I am a woman, a first-generation college graduate in my family, and people in remote or underserved locations who may not have access to the same economic opportunities as their urban or more privileged counterparts.

I love working with SAP because it helps businesses improve their processes. It's amazing to see how technology can make such a big difference. I want to keep learning and growing in this field to have a great career.

I'm eager to take a free certification attempt because it will help me learn more and become even better at what I do. I know that the world of technology is always changing, and I want to stay up-to-date with the latest advancements. I am grateful for this opportunity and excited about the possibilities ahead. Thank you for considering my application for the free certification attempt.

Thanks & Regards,

Ha Mai Hanh

entry.title: Re: Automated updates in Enable Now
entry.content:
Hi Jaja,

When you mention that you have manuals in Enable Now, I assume that you have Book and Book Pages, with links to Simulations.  So, you generate the manuals using the Compound Document functionality in Producer.

If this is the case, one way that you could achieve this is to create a Text Unit for each Book (Manual).  The Text Unit would be placed at the beginning of the other content, assuming that you want the change details to generate into the Manual at the beginning.  The following is an example of how you could deliver your requirement:

 In this example, the text on the Text Unit is included in the documentation but is not shown if the corresponding Book Page is played online through Manager.  If the Text Unit text does not appear in your Compound Document when you generate the documentation, just make sure that the following setting in the Compound Document settings is turned on.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: 交货单批次拆分过账后不能按照数量部分开票
entry.content:
交货单批次拆分过账后不能按照数量部分开票

交货单批次拆分过账后，创建开票。

在选择交货相关开票中，即使只选择了部分数量，系统也会将物料的全部交货数量复制到开票凭证中。

 

APP：创建开票凭证

通过APP执行也是不能操作部分开票。

 

是否调整了销售行项目类别TAN的Billing Relevance字段值为K就可以解决此问题？？

entry.title: Introduction SAP Certified Associate - Implementation Consultant - SAP S/4Hana Cloud Public Edition
entry.content:
Hello Everyone,

My name is Anthony, and I’m excited to be a part of this SAP Learning Community! A little about myself: I currently work as a District Manager with a background primarily in Operations & HR. (Fun fact: I enjoy lifting, cycling, and being near/in the water.)

I’m currently working towards my SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Certificate with the Vower learning group via the bootcamp offered, and I’m really looking forward to expanding my knowledge in SAP as I have used SAP with my current employer, and previous employers. I would like to use/apply the knowledge gained from the certificate to increase my marketability as an employee.

I’m particularly excited about obtaining this certification because I would like to transition my career into technology.

I’m also open to connecting with others to increase my network and learn from others that have more expertise than me or are on a similar journey as me learning more about SAP.

Looking forward to learning and growing with all of you!

Best Regards,  

Anthony Jones

entry.title: Re: add multiple email for sending payment advice F110
entry.content:
Create a custom FM for BTE event 2040 - Autom. pmnt transactions: output of pmnt advice note. You can copy SAMPLE_PROCESS_00002040 to a custom FM and do the customization there.

Look for C_FINAA-INTAD - this is where you can assign the email address. You need to concatenate the email addresses separated by a space (e.g. email1 email2 email3 ...). Refer to table ADSMTP (already in the FM) it will have all the email addresses on that vendor/customer.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)

I have joined the SAP training (MM/PP) with one SAP Partner and would like to get certified in SAP areas which could be effectively applied in both my support and implementation projects.

Thank you for the opportunity that SAP is providing to participate in SAP Learning’s Digital Skills Initiative. I am very much interested in this program; I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Regards,

PHAN HA

entry.title: Re: Practical governance to drive fit-to-standard mindset in your SAP S/4HANA implementation
entry.content: pornchai1972@gmail.com

entry.title: Re: Cannot cancel business completion since the priority...
entry.content:
Hi,

It appears the priority field has been made mandatory either through field settings or using custom enhancement. You can verify the configuration first and send corrective TR if that is the case.

If there is a custom enhancement, then speak with your technical/ABAP team and ask them to amend the code to make it based on the system status.

In either case (config issue or custom enhancement), the priority field should be made mandatory basis system status (CRTD/REL as an example). Otherwise in case of TECO/CLSD status, the fields in the work order are made non-modifiable by SAP. This will then lead to a kind of deadlock situation.

 Regards,

Vijay

entry.title: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content:
So I'm trying to call the program RM08RELEASE or Transaction MRBR using the SUBMIT button. However, I'm not sure how do I include this MRBR options in the SUBMIT syntax. I want to Manually Release all the Invoices with Manual Payment Block.

 

 

 

SUBMIT RM08RELEASE
WITH SO_BUKRS = IT_VENDOR-BUKRS
WITH SO_GJAHR = P_GJAHR
WITH SO_LIFNR = P_LIFNR
AND RETURN.

entry.title: Inspection lot blocking in APO
entry.content:
We have used User exit APOCF011 for stocks which blocks incoming stock from ECC to APO as and when required with a custom validation table during PPDS optimizer run to give optimizer a constant stock values, But what is happening now is When the inspection lot gets posted to  unrestricted stock from ECC the stock value doesn't gets updated to APO side as we have blocked the  incoming STOCK and it shows shortage of stock in RRP3, So now i want block incoming Inspection lots also but i am not able to find any USER exit available from APO SIDE,

I found 2 BAdi's in APO but not sure where to impellent it or call it in which program, Can someone help?

these are the BADi's i have found.

/sapapo/lnsplot

/sapapo/cif_enhance

    • First generation college students
    • People looking to switch their careers mid-life

I am willing to learn more about SAP and to undergo the rigors of studying for SAP Certification. I have completed my first learning journey Project Manage SAP S/4 Hana Implementation and I awaiting my certification attempt

Thank you

entry.title: Purchase order date change in APO With User Exit
entry.content: We have one enhancement where we are blocking incoming Purchase orders for sometime with a validation table during PPDS optimizer run with user EXIT APOCF006, Now i want to change PO date in APO using this exit I saw it has Date and GR processing time in that exit, SAP Documentation says we can create, change. delete PO  with the help of this user exit , So if i change the PO date with the help of this User exit then will it publish to changes to R/3 Side also? I don't want publish them in R/3 side . I only want to have the change in APO side.

entry.title: Re: Generate Booked Data based on attribute
entry.content:
something like this:

MEMBERSET [d/Product] = %Product%
MEMBERSET [d/Scenario] = %SCN1%
MEMBERSET [d/Entity].[p/Scoped] = "YES"

DATA() = 1 - 1

Kartik Singhal

entry.title: Quering an OData Endpoint with a timestamp does not work in CDS
entry.content:
Hi,

I wrote a CAP service which is communicating with C4C via OData.

In the service I  want to read all BusinessPartner with a certain ChangeDate.

The pure OData Call will be:

https://myXXXXX.crm.ondemand.com/sap/c4c/odata/v1/c4codataapi/BusinessPartnerCollection?$filter=EntityLastChangedOn ge datetimeoffset'2024-01-10T06:35:38.1533450Z'

In my service I wrote:

const c4cBuPaService = await cds.connect.to("c4c_bupa");
const allBuPa = await c4cBuPaService.run(SELECT(["AccountID", "ContactID"]).from("ContactCollection").where(`ChangedOn > datetimeoffset'${myDate.toISOString()}'`.toString()));
        This leads to an error, because with CDS icompiles the statement to
....$filter=EntityLastChangedOn ge 'datetimeoffset'2024-01-10T06:35:38.1533450Z''

So, the datetimeoffset is enclosed in quotation marks.
I tried all various options to change it, no success.

So my question would be: How to query a timestamp in CDS?

Thanks
Jens

entry.title: Re: How to find package S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1
entry.content:
Hi Nicole,

Have u found the S4HANA2023CORE HANA DB Export 1 file.

entry.title: Re: T-code for clearing Gl account
entry.content:
So what do you exactly mean by clearing these accounts, what is your 'target' ?

To change the G/L account to open items management, you need to use an interim account to transfer postings to make the account balance zero, switch on open item management, run program RFSEPA02 (copy to a Z program), transfer back the balance from interim account.

Then F-31

entry.title: Re: ALV grid no sum toolbar button
entry.content:
there is spelling mistake in modify fieldcat 

ls_fieldcat-do_sum = 'X'.
modify lt_fieldcat from ls_fielcat.

line 2 - ls_fieldcat

entry.title: Re: Review booklet tab does not appear on manage kpis and...
entry.content: Thank you for your answer. I have copied the business catalogue SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_RVB_PC and created a new one. However, I still do not see the button "review booklet". Have you got any ideas on how to solve this? Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content:
I guess your question is not specific to this program, but to all programs with radio buttons.

So, taking the program RM08RELEASE as an example, Release Manually is PA_XMANU and Release Automatically is PA_XAUTO, if you want to select the button automatically, you pass WITH PA_XMANU = ' ' WITH PA_XAUTO = 'X' (indicate all the fields of the same group of radio buttons).

entry.title: Re: get_ddic_reference( ) returns blanks
entry.content: Basically define your itab structure as a ddic structure and not in your code.

entry.title: Purchase order date change in APO With User Exit
entry.content: We have one enhancement where we are blocking incoming Purchase orders for sometime with a validation table during PPDS optimizer run with user EXIT APOCF006, Now i want to change PO date in APO using this exit I saw it has Date and GR processing time in that exit, SAP Documentation says we can create, change. delete PO  with the help of this user exit , So if i change the PO date with the help of this User exit then will it publish to changes to R/3 Side also? I don't want publish them in R/3 side . I only want to have the change in APO side.

entry.title: Re: Simple generic popup selection screen for quick input or output
Re: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content: HI,

entry.title: Re: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content:
@Sandra_Rossimy concern with PA_XMANU is the user still has to manually select the invoice and click the release button and save.

I have tried to change the options to "Release Automatically" and "Manual Payment Block"

But encountered this kind of error

entry.title: Re: SD/EWM Real Open Quantities in Sales Schedule Agreement / Schedule Lines
entry.content: HI, you have to check the ATP (Available to promise) settings. If you want to reconfirm from one salesorder to another have also a look at the BOP (backorder processing). Kind regards Robert

entry.title: Re: Simple generic popup selection screen for quick input or output
entry.content: Thanks for sharing this piece of art, with this class it is easier to create a selection screen, for a simple use as a popup to confirm or set data it is a good choice. Now I use it some time, when I need a series of values ​​that must be chosen by the user and connect a field with a dropdown list with value automatically retrieved from the domain.

entry.title: Review booklet tab does not appear on manage kpis and reports app
entry.content:
I I would like to create a review booklet according to this blog. However, I do not see a "Review boolket" button above the screen next to "Stories". 

I have created a new role that includes the business catalogue SAP_CORE_BC_EXT_RVB_PC and asssigned to a user. However I still cannot see a button "Review boolket". How can I make it appear?

Thank you very much in advance!

Review Booklet Designer (Concept and Adaptability)... - SAP Community

entry.title: ABAP PLATFORM Standalone?
entry.content:
Hi all,

in the past it was possible to get a licence for "SAP NETWEAVER AS ABAP" and run it standalone as a ABAP stack on premise. With the movement to S/4HANA there is not the "ABAP PLATFORM".

Question: Is it also possible to run the "ABAP PLATFORM" standalone without the ERP layer on top? Or is it only possible to get it in combination with S/4HANA?

Best, Bartho.

entry.title: Re: How to solve simple requirement with RAP, Fiori Eleme...
entry.content: There is no answer/reply button to your post. Pls see my answer in answers to my post.

Was the image removed?

entry.title: CAT2 timesheet posting directly to status 30 in CATSDB table
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone help me with the configuration/set-up which needs to be done to post CAT2 timesheet directly to status 30 skipping status 10 and 20 and display in CATSDB table as status 30.

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Which products are addressed in the SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise road
entry.content:
thank you. Can I ask you

Which additional scope option does the strategic advisory service for cloud analytics offer? Note: There are 2 correct answers to this question
A . Extended package
B . SAP S/4HANA for central finance
C . Baseline package
D . SAP Activate methodology for the Intelligent Enterprise

entry.title: Re: Inproces inspection result recording
entry.content:
Greetings,

I don't think you can prevent operation confirmation if results are not recorded per standard but I am sure you could develop some additional logic. Partial confirmations are possible.

You can use multiple sampling functionality in sampling procedure. Depending on the result the system will increase sample size. Depending on the configuration you might need to use sampling scheme or not.

Best regards, Matjaž.

entry.title: Re: Initial value of 0FISCPER is replaced wrongly
entry.content: Hi, we changed the code here and it works. And we will check some notes to verify if we have to redesign our coding concerning exit-variables. Thanks for your help so far. Regards, Peter

entry.title: Re: Forecast Layout with Input control Cut over date
entry.content:
Hi, 

This is a really old thread but I faced the exactly similar issue yesterday and the resolution was rather unexpected.

Starting point: story with multiple tabs. I had to do some layout (just layout, not logic) edits to multiple pages of the story. At some point I noticed that cut-over date selection (in planning page)  had broken with exactly same error message. It was not possible to get it working by re-creating. Switching to "today" however worked.

After some hours of investigation I noticed that the selection gets broken when I enter another tab (let's call it comparison page) during the edit mode. No need to do any edits, just enter it in edit mode. If I didn't enter that page (comparison page), the selection did not get broken (in planning page). You read right: entering in edit mode in another tab was breaking the cut-over selection in another tab(!)

The issue turned out to be a broken graph component in comparison page. When I removed the broken graph component, the issue went completely away and already broken cut-over date selection started working.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Client install on Azure Remote Desktop
entry.content: Our company run SAP Business One in Azure Virtual Desktop. It is basically the same as a terminal server or remote desktop setup. However there is quite a lot to learn with Azure Virtual Desktop if you want to do it well and for it to be reliable. Our company is a Microsoft Partner and of you wanted to we could have an initial conversation about your goals and how we can help you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Business One Client install on Azure Remote Desktop
entry.content: To answer your domain authentication question, it is possible to connect from a non domain PC but you need to Authenticate to the domain first in some way.

entry.title: How to notify multiple users?
entry.content:
Hello,

I don't know if this is even possible, but I'm trying to create an app in SAP Build Apps, and I need a button to send a notification to everyone in the user's friend group when they click the button. Bonus points if it can override silent mode and do not disturb

If this isn't possible with SAP Build Apps, could anyone recommend me another app builder that does have this function? It's a crucial part of the app I'm trying to make.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: How to manually set message tatus in CPI MessageProcessingLog?
entry.content: Is there any option to set Message status for example from Headers and make it as FAILED even if message ends with "END MESSAGE" ?

entry.title: WPT issue for Single Warehouse is assigned with a plant having multiple Sloc
entry.content:
Hi Team,


As per business requirement we have maintained one warehouse with a plant having multiple storage location. So while fetching the WPT -Warehouse process type, will be challenging for same products will be going to "Multiple Sloc for the same Plant". Please help us with this scenario.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: WPT issue for Single Warehouse is assigned with a pla...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

I will be more interested in the requirement why two(/multiple) GR ZONE is required for one warehouse.

But it is possible to determine different destination Storage bin during putaway according to the plant and storage location.

Eg. It is possible to define unrestricted used stock as F1, F2, F3…. To different plants and locations.

 

Then determine the putaway stratergies with customizings "Specify Storage Type Search Seauence for Putaway" and "Optimize Access Strategy for Storage type search : Putaway", you can also consider BADI Storage Type Search Sequence and Putaway Rule Change - /SCWM/EX4_CORE_PTS_TYPSQ.

 

Best Regards,

entry.title: Re: Custom Alert for different periods
entry.content: Thank you, Piyush

entry.title: Re: Which is preferred : SAP Certified Enterprise Architect OR TOGAF Certified EA ?
entry.content:
If I may add from my experience (having earned both SAP EA Architect and TOGAF 8/9 certifications)...

So, my observation from last 20 years of SAP experience is that TOGAF and traditional SAP EA frameworks have historically been more aligned with on-premise implementations. TOGAF, while powerful in creating structured enterprise architecture, can sometimes feel rigid and cumbersome in fast-evolving cloud environments like SAP Public Cloud or Private Cloud.

In cloud implementations, flexibility, speed, and adaptability are key. This is where tools like LeanIX and SAP Signavio offer a significant advantage. LeanIX, for instance, is designed for managing cloud-native architectures, providing real-time insights into the application landscape, dependencies, and risks. Its lightweight, agile approach aligns with the needs of cloud deployments, where rapid iterations and scaling are critical.

SAP Signavio supports business process management and helps streamline process optimization and transformation—especially useful in SAP S/4HANA implementations, including Public Cloud scenarios. By focusing on process intelligence and customer-centric design, it helps businesses adapt more quickly to cloud dynamics.

While TOGAF and SAP EA still offer valuable governance and structured approaches for overarching enterprise architecture (especially in hybrid or larger, long-term strategic contexts), LeanIX and Signavio are more suitable for the rapid, agile, and evolving nature of cloud-based environments. They provide more real-time, adaptable solutions that align with cloud deployment models.

So, for a cloud-focused enterprise, inclination toward LeanIX and Signavio is quite logical, as these tools offer more modern, cloud-friendly capabilities compared to the traditional TOGAF and SAP EA frameworks.

Happy Friday 🙂
Aleksander Godzilo-Godlewski

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hi David,

I’m excited to join the digital skills initiative! With a background in IT, I’m eager to enhance my SAP knowledge and skills. This program aligns perfectly with my career goals. Looking forward to it!

entry.title: Re: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content: So "blocking procedure" is a group of 3 fields. Did you "indicate all the fields of the same group of radio buttons"?

entry.title: Re: SAP Signavio Process Manager - Attribute Visualizatio...
entry.content:
Hello Damaris,

a few weeks ago I had a similar problem. I solved it by reusing the attribute I wanted to visualise on the BPMN object. See the screenshot below. (Sorry, it is in German) There you can see that this attribute is used in the glossary and in the BPMN objects. When you do this, the attribute appears in the visualisation context menu and you can use it.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: PR requisitioner validation table?
entry.content:
Hi @scottcarricknwn 

Seems the given message is custom. to verify further, please click on 'technical Information' icon as highlighted in the attached image for better understanding.

Normally PR 'Requisitioner' field is a free field. Please try to verify keyboard 'F4' option in that field for any possible entries may designed for the field and go for the available options.
Please revert with your update.

entry.title: Re: Using workzone on separate subaccount from application
entry.content:
Hi,

Maybe this blog can help you out: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/integrate-app-into-work-zone-from-a-different-subaccount/ba-p/13584425

Kind regards,

Julian Kuipers

entry.title: Re: Using Submit to call the program RM08RELEASE
entry.content: It's not an ABAP question. You are asking why standard MRBR requires to select "blocked due to variances" when "release automatically" is selected.

entry.title: Re: Error reading material ledger period records
entry.content: Hi Jain, Did you get the solution for this error? I also facing error like that.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Dear @David_Chaviano ,

i appreciate SAP efforts for supporting cloud learning and Digital Skills Initiative.

Happy to be the part of SAP.

entry.title: Re: How to do a XML to JSON mapping
entry.content: This is because your json schema is missing some elements, try this one;

entry.title: Re: How to do a XML to JSON mapping
entry.content: { "openapi": "3.0.0", "info": { "title": "Employee API", "version": "1.0.0" }, "paths": { "/employees": { "get": { "summary": "Get list of employees", "responses": { "200": { "description": "A list of employees", "content": { "application/json": { "schema": { "$ref": "#/components/schemas/Employees" } } } } } } } }, "components": { "schemas": { "Employees": { "type": "object", "properties": { "Employee": { "type": "array", "items": { "type": "object", "properties": { "displayName": { "type": "string" }, "firstName": { "type": "string" }, "lastName": { "type": "string" }, "managerName": { "type": "string" }, "managerEmail": { "type": "string", "format": "email" }, "managerSCIMID": { "type": "string", "format": "uuid" }, "mobilePhone": { "type": "string" }, "email": { "type": "string", "format": "email" }, "SAMAccountName": { "type": "string" }, "userPrincipalName": { "type": "string" } } } } } } } } }

entry.title: Re: Unable to create material master due to Accounting1 e...
entry.content:
Hi @Saurabh_2804 

Normally Termination error (ABAP run time error) should not come in the system.
Termination Issues happens due to custom development code or Improper authorization matrix.
Try to create material again. Once termination happens, request ABAPer to check in ST22 t-code for the root cause.

entry.title: Feature Request: Define custom colour palette in Signavio Process Intelligence
entry.content:
Hi,

we would like to raise a feature request which enables us to define our own colour palette within Signavio Process Intelligence:

 

We would like to be able to match the palettes with our corporate colours - in the same way as we are already able to do in Signavio Process Manager. 

Thank you,

Anna

entry.title: Re: Subcontracting process return of goods - MB04
entry.content:
Hi @Wesleypcruz 

Correction of Vendor invoice can be done through the t-code: MIRO
MIRO > Subsequent Credit - For decreasing the vendor Invoice value without quantity.
MIRO > Subsequent Debit - For Increasing the vendor Invoice value without quantity.
Please revert with your update.

entry.title: change the fix 的接口标准报文是什么？
entry.content: https://my200060-api.s4hana.sapcloud.cn/sap/bc/srt/scs_ext/sap/fixedassetchange

entry.title: Re: change the fix 的接口标准报文是什么？
entry.content: <soap:Envelope xmlns:soap="http://www.w3.org/2003/05/soap-envelope" xmlns:fi="http://sap.com/xi/FI-AA" xmlns:yy1="http://SAPCustomFields.com/YY1_">
